Ring Sets Collection

Meteorite Ring Sets

Matching sets designed to be worn together — an engagement ring and wedding band united by the same cosmic materials, made by hand in Minneapolis.

61 pieces
Secure Checkout SSL encrypted via Shopify
Free Laser Engraving Up to 25 characters, choice of fonts
Authentic Materials Certified Gibeon meteorite
Happy Customers Thousands of rings made
Handmade in USA Every piece, by hand
30-Day Returns In-store credit issued

Jewelry by Johan
Gibeon MeteoriteTitanium

Unique Meteorite Wedding Ring Set with Rough Aquamarine Engagement Ring

View at Johan

A meteorite ring set means both partners carry a fragment of the same ancient cosmos — matched in material, coordinated in design, made by the same hands in the same Minneapolis workshop. Johan designs each set so the engagement ring and wedding band either nest flush together or complement each other's proportions when worn side by side.

Most sets pair a wider men's band — typically 8mm or 10mm — with a narrower women's band or engagement ring. The meteorite inlays are cut from coordinating sections of authentic Gibeon iron so the crystal patterns feel visually related even as every fragment remains unique. Many sets incorporate additional materials: dinosaur bone, 14k yellow or rose gold, whiskey barrel oak, or diamond accents alongside the meteorite.

Because every piece is made to order, width, metal, finish, and engraving can all be customized at checkout on Jewelry by Johan. Ring sets cannot be resized after production — use the sizing guide carefully, or order custom ring sizers in both widths before committing to production.

Free laser engraving of up to 25 characters — with your choice of font — is included on each ring in the set. A matching set from this collection is one of the most personal ways two people can share the same piece of the solar system.

Complete Your Purchase

All orders, customizations, and checkout happen on our main store — Jewelry by Johan — with secure Shopify checkout.
